channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned Wheely bin, 9th March
item.description:
A seemingly abandoned black bin with no lid has been left on the corner of ceres road (a fly tipping hot spot) for weeks and is filled with rubbish but doesn't get emptied since it's not outside a house. It's attracting flies and vermin and smells rancid.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kashgar Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary 3-way traffic lights not operational, 9th March
item.description:
The temporary traffic lights in place at the Hollies avenue road closure are not operational. no lights are illuminated at all 3 ways of traffic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 123A, Halfway Street, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At least 10 reports here for a dangerous pothole, 9th March
item.description:
Why has this very serious report not been actioned yet despite at least 10 reports from residents flagging it up? Residents have had to put old blankets in this hole as a temporary fix. Please LBB can you ask Riney to urgently inspect and either do a quick temporary fix here or a full pothole fix please?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping left outside 21 Yoakley Road, 9th March
item.description:
Boiler liner (?) left today.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Yoakley Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Southwark bin, 9th March
item.description:
Graffiti on Southwark bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of allotment littered with beer cans, 9th March
item.description:
Please collect

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep sharp edged pothole, 9th March
item.description:
There is a deep and very sharp edged pothole - it has completely ripped the inside edge of two of my tyres due to the depth.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 113, Albany Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, 9th March
item.description:
It is shaking the whole house when the bus goes over it and is waking up the kids. It’s going to blow so many people’s tyres. It’s been like it for a couple of months now, please fix urgently
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th March
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped a clothes horse, paint, bucket and rugs outside our building. They've been here for a few days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gloucester Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Victoria Road outside number 17, 9th March
item.description:
A large basketball net and apparatus has been left on the road for now a few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lynton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: 15 inch pothole on Prince Rupert Road, in the middle of the street near door numbers 6-8, by the junction of Congreve Road, 9th March
item.description:
This pothole has been here for a couple of weeks, it’s quite gravelly on the inside and car tyres keep getting grazed when driving over it.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prince Rupert Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Persistent dog fouling, 9th March
item.description:
There is dog poo or poo bags under every street street on Lavell Street. This is a continual problem.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lavell Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars on double yellow blips blocking driveway, 9th March
item.description:
Cars parked on double yellow blips blocking access to driveway and garage.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing problem outside 63 kingsground., 9th March
item.description:
Disgusting outside 63 kingsground..ongoing problem by Tennant. Needs dealing with .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsground, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerously uneven road surface across a large area immediately outside Barclays Bank, 9th March
item.description:
This poor road surface outside Barclays Bank has been like this for several months and is getting worse. The drain cover is also sinking and adding to the problem.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Place, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose paving stone creating trip hazard, 9th March
item.description:
Caused a friend to trip this evening and only narrowly avoided falling over. The same happened to another passer-by. Paving stone dips deeply, creating raised trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westmoreland Place, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of garden waste and a wooden pallet, 9th March
item.description:
Left on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Hill, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial properties blocking use of communal bins, 9th March
item.description:
Work being conducted by landlord of flats above Co-Op and Nail Bar on Tyler Street/ Trafalgar Road is blocking the residents’ access to their communal dustbins. As such, they are leaving them in the street outside. Vermin and the elements are spreading the waste across the street. It is across pavements, roads and in the gutter. A number of small children live on the road and it is a hygiene and public health issue, as well as an eyesore. Please send someone to assist and also speak to the landlord blocking the residents access to refuse areas.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tyler Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More litter on the corner, 9th March
item.description:
More litter has been placed on the corner where the unknown red caddy bin is also, please remove
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadowford Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 9th March
item.description:
Please remove thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thamesmere Drive, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
